channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: 🔥 Kelp DAO’s $290M hack just spirals: $175M laundering through THORChain/Umbra muddies the trail. Arbitrum freezes 30,766 ETH as funds slip into non-custodial mixers. https://Blockchain.News/news/kelp-exploiter-launders-175m-stolen-funds #Crypto #DeFi #Security

item.title: Harvey bets big on trust: verifiability, consistency, security. New Head of Trust Joshua McKibben sharpens transparency in legal AI. 🔒🔎 https://Blockchain.News/news/trust-legal-ai-harvey-joshua-mckibben #AI #LegalTech #Security

item.title: Core Scientific bets big on debt to fund data-center push 🚨 secured notes worth $3.3B target growth, not a crypto rally. What it means for investors. https://Blockchain.News/news/core-scientific-secured-notes-offering-2026 #crypto #infrastructure #CORZ
